posts.caption:
THANK GOD THAT STONE WAS ROLLED AWAY 🙌🏼✝️
•
A pastor yesterday morning was preaching about the prodigal son and this song came to my mind while I was listening. God forgive me because I’ve been and often am the prodigal, the thief, the criminal BUT JESUS CAME! Thank you God that you called me out death and into your marvelous light. You are good to your kids!
•
Homecoming - Bethel Music
🎥: @thecalebelliott 
🥁: @brockstar01 
🎤: @lesliebaker.hair 
#worshipmusic #homecoming #praisegod #jesus #prodigalson #bethelmusic #coryasbury #gablepriceandfriends #church #praise

posts.caption:
WORK WEDNESDAY - SURGE WKND 2024

Every Wednesday, we're spotlighting some of our favorite projects!

This Surge WKND recap video will always be one of my favorites. It captures the perfect mix of emotional, cinematic moments and high-energy hype shots—all tied together with a powerful spoken word from the emcee. Truly unforgettable.
•
•

posts.caption:
Lauren + Nathan

🎥 Wow. Capturing this wedding was an absolute blast! I had an incredible time filming this couple's special day, and the energy was simply contagious! If you want to relive those magical moments, don't hesitate to click the link in my bio to watch the video.

📢 But wait, there's more exciting news! We've officially ventured into the world of wedding cinematography! If you or anyone you know is in need of a skilled and passionate team to film their wedding, look no further. We pour our hearts into every project, ensuring that each precious moment is captured with the best dedication and care. Trust me, you won't find a more devoted group of professionals in this field.

👉 DM us today and let's turn your dream wedding into an unforgettable film!
